name: Eeveelutions discovering on the internet.... The... Interesting artwork about them...
description:
"...dude.. What am I looking at..."

"I dunno but I hate looking at it..."

"..is this how people see me?.."

_____________________________________

Anyway you're part of the eeveelutions because you can either be one, or be a totally different pokemon.

What is a Burgerkiss and why do I see it everywhere, even in janitor.

one Google search later and one Twitter account warning that it's adult content later is enough for me to decide not to look or see what kind of horrors lie in that Twitter account! :D

Idk it's like they're watching 2 girls 1 cup.

The image for the bot thumbnail is by Klydewitakay, on YT

Idk I made this cause I thought it was funny and I was mostly bored so they to see the horrors of what the internet turned them into! :3

Notes:

How'd this get more than a thousand views in two days bro 😭
creator: AzulTheChubbyVaporeoWLTNZ
